findings.message: exec.CommandContext called with a non-literal command name — verify the value cannot be influenced by untrusted input
findings.remediation: use a fixed command name string literal; pass variable data only as arguments, never as the command name

findings.message: int32(x) — explicit narrowing conversion may silently truncate bits if x exceeds the target type's range
findings.remediation: add an explicit range check before the conversion, or use math/bits or saturating arithmetic

findings.message: int32(x) — explicit narrowing conversion may silently truncate bits if x exceeds the target type's range
findings.remediation: add an explicit range check before the conversion, or use math/bits or saturating arithmetic

findings.remediation: use mode 0750 (owner+group rwx) or stricter

findings.message: Pack: os.Stat followed by file operation — TOCTOU race; another process may modify the file between check and use
findings.remediation: open the file directly and handle ENOENT/EEXIST; avoid stat-then-open patterns
